Hannah Montana: The Movie (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $79,576,189Details
International Box Office $89,597,017
Worldwide Box Office $169,173,206
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $62,187,395
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,115,185
Total $65,302,580
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$32,324,487 (40.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,118 opening theaters/3,231 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $120,000,898

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 10th, 2009 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 27th, 2026 (Limited) (Re-release) (Spain)
Video Release: August 18th, 2009 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment, released as Hannah Montana The Movie
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 102 minutes
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Target audience: Tween
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Millar/Gough Ink
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
